channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistani leadership calls for unified national approach amid Middle East war and economic strain
item.description: In Islamabad, President Asif Ali Zardari and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif held extensive consultations on the country’s security, economic, and energy challenges, prompted by the ongoing US-Israeli c...

item.title: Canadian Authorities Issue Warnings About Fraud Ahead of FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 draws near, authorities in Canada are alerting both residents and visitors to potential fraud schemes associated with the event. Hosted across Canada, the United States, and...

item.title: Avi Lewis Expresses Interest in Guidance from Former NDP Leader Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Avi Lewis, recently elected as the new leader of the New Democratic Party (NDP), expressed openness to receiving advice from his predecessor, Jagmeet Singh, during his first press conference in Winnip...

item.title: Mudavadi Defends Nairobi National-County Cooperation Agreement Before Senate
item.description: Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi has defended the newly signed cooperation agreement between the national government and Nairobi City County Government before the Senate’s Devolution Committee...

item.title: Top Amazon Travel Deals for Luggage, Backpacks, and Accessories This Spring
item.description: With spring travel approaching, Amazon's Prime Day deals provide significant discounts on luggage, backpacks, travel accessories, and personal items. CNN Underscored highlights editor-approved product...

item.title: Ontario Colleges Face Financial Strain: Executive Salaries Highlight Discrepancy Amidst Layoffs
item.description: A recent report has revealed that the average salary for presidents of Ontario’s public colleges reached a staggering $500,000, a figure that has drawn scrutiny as institutions grapple with significan...

item.title: Russia expels British diplomat after espionage allegations
item.description: Russia has ordered the expulsion of a British diplomat accused of espionage, escalating tensions between London and Moscow. According to Russia’s Federal Security Service (FSB), the unnamed diplomat w...

item.title: How Much Fibre Is Really Healthy for Your Gut?
item.description: The article explores the growing trend of 'fibremaxxing', a social media movement promoting high-fibre diets, and examines whether consuming large amounts of fibre is truly beneficial. According to Dr...

item.title: Former HDFC Chairman Explains His Resignation Over Ethical Differences
item.description: The former chairman of HDFC has publicly revealed that his abrupt resignation from the organisation stemmed from ethical disagreements within the company’s leadership. According to his statements, the...

item.title: Victoria Police Capture Dezi Freeman After Seven-Month Manhunt, Fuel Excise Reduced, Narelle’s Full Damage Revealed
item.description: In this episode of The Nightly, journalist Ben O’Shea covers several major events making headlines across Australia. The primary focus is on Dezi Freeman, a man who had been on the run for seven month...

item.title: Lawyers to File Impeachment Case Against Comelec Officials Over Election Irregularities
item.description: A group of Filipino lawyers has announced plans to file an impeachment complaint before the House of Representatives against Commission on Elections (Comelec) Chairperson George Garcia and six Commiss...

item.title: Iringa prepares to honour late William Lukuvi with a state funeral
item.description: Tanzania is set to hold a state funeral for the late William Vangimembe Lukuvi, former Minister of State in the Prime Minister’s Office, on March 31, 2026, at his home village of Idodi in Iringa Distr...

item.title: Tanzania's CUF Party Navigates Leadership Transition and Internal Disputes
item.description: Tanzania's Chama Cha Umoja na Utaifa (CUF) party is currently facing a period of transition and internal conflict following the formal departure of its longtime leader, Prof. Ibrahim Lipumba. During a...

item.title: Spain Restricts U.S. Military Access Amid Tensions Over Iran Conflict
item.description: Spain has formally closed its airspace to U.S. military planes involved in attacks on Iran, extending its previous denial of base usage for such operations. The Spanish government emphasized that this...

item.title: PM Shehbaz outlines relief and austerity measures to address fuel crisis impact
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has stated that the government is actively implementing relief measures to support Pakistan’s lower and middle-income groups as global fuel prices surge because of the on...

item.title: President Zardari and PM Shehbaz discuss national security and regional developments
item.description: On Monday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met with President Asif Ali Zardari to assess the overall national security situation and key challenges facing Pakistan. The meeting came shortly after a quad...

item.title: Prime Video unveils ‘Crime 101’ trailer starring Hemsworth, Berry and Ruffalo
item.description: The much-anticipated trailer for 'Crime 101' has been released, offering audiences a first glimpse at Bart Layton’s adaptation of Don Winslow’s novella. This heist thriller features an impressive cast...

item.title: Larry Madowo honoured for bold reporting on East African human rights struggles
item.description: Kenyan journalist Larry Madowo has been named the Human Rights Defender of the Year during the 10th anniversary of the Human Rights Defenders (HRD) Awards. The recognition celebrates his fearless cove...

item.title: Highlighting Women’s Role in Coping with Climate Change in Tanzania
item.description: In Tanzania, women are facing the biggest burden from climate change even though their contributions remain largely unnoticed in policy making and development planning. Most women in rural and urban c...

item.title: Turbo Energy projects strong FY 2025 revenue growth, shares increase by 13%
item.description: Turbo Energy, S.A. (TURB) announced its preliminary, unaudited revenue forecast for fiscal year 2025, expecting total revenue to fall between $22.5 million and $23.5 million. This represents a substan...
